title: DISASTER DISTRESS HELPLINE - 211info
text: SUBSTANCE ABUSE AND MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES ADMINISTRATION DISASTER DISTRESS HELPLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides disaster crisis counseling to those are experiencing emotional distress related to natural or human-caused disasters. 5600 Fishers Lane Rockville, MD 20857 Eligibility: Survivors of disasters, loved ones of victims, first responders, rescue, recovery, and relief workers, clergy, and parents and caregivers Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days a week Email (800) 985-5990 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (800) 487-4889 TTY/TTD (877) 726-4727 Toll-free 877-SAMHSA-7 Main phone (800) 985-5990 Call Or Text Alternate (800) 985-5990 Videophone Deaf and Hard of Hearing ASL Español (800) 985-5990 ext 2 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, text, or visit website for more information. Deaf and Hard of Hearing ASL callers can call from videophone or use the ASL button on the agency website. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Disaster Service Centers/Hotlines Disaster Service Centers/Hotlines * Deafness Other Services Offered At This Location: INFORMATION SERVICES - FINDTREATMENT.GOV MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - 988 SUICIDE AND CRISIS LIFELINE SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - SUBSTANCE ABUSE AND MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES ADMINISTRATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SUBSTANCE ABUSE AND MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES ADMINISTRATION
